name: case_number
description: Court case number (top right of the form).

name: your_name
description: Your full name (Section 1 — Your Information).

name: your_relationship_to_children_parent
description: Section 1 — Your relationship to the children: Parent.

name: your_relationship_to_children_legal_guardian
description: Section 1 — Your relationship to the children: Legal guardian.

name: your_relationship_to_children_other
description: Section 1 — Your relationship to the children: Other (use the describe line if checked).

name: your_relationship_to_children_other_description
description: Section 1 — Describe your relationship to the children if "Other" is selected.

name: person_you_want_protection_from_name
description: Full name of the person you want protection from (Section 2).

name: person_in_item_2_relationship_to_children_parent
description: Section 2 — That person's relationship to the children: Parent.

name: person_in_item_2_relationship_to_children_legal_guardian
description: Section 2 — That person's relationship to the children: Legal guardian.

name: person_in_item_2_relationship_to_children_other
description: Section 2 — That person's relationship to the children: Other (use the describe line if checked).

name: person_in_item_2_relationship_to_children_other_description
description: Section 2 — Describe their relationship to the children if "Other" is selected.

name: child_a_name
description: Section 3 — Oldest child (row a): full name.

name: child_a_date_of_birth
description: Section 3 — Oldest child (row a): date of birth.

name: child_b_name
description: Section 3 — Child row b: full name.

name: child_b_date_of_birth
description: Section 3 — Child row b: date of birth.

name: child_c_name
description: Section 3 — Child row c: full name.

name: child_c_date_of_birth
description: Section 3 — Child row c: date of birth.

name: child_d_name
description: Section 3 — Youngest listed child (row d): full name.

name: child_d_date_of_birth
description: Section 3 — Child row d: date of birth.

name: children_need_more_space_attachment
description: Section 3 — Check if more space is needed; attach continuation labeled "DV-105, Children" per form instructions.

name: all_children_lived_together_five_years_no
description: Section 4a — All children listed in item 3 have not lived together for the last five years (complete DV-105(A); skip 4b on this form per instructions).

name: all_children_lived_together_five_years_yes
description: Section 4a — All children listed in item 3 have lived together for the last five years (complete item 4b below).

name: residence_history_row_1_date_from
description: Section 4b — Current residence row: start date (month/year) through present.

name: residence_history_row_1_city_state
description: Section 4b — Current residence row: city and state (include tribal land if applicable).

name: residence_history_row_1_address_confidential
description: Section 4b — Row 1: this address is private/confidential; list state only per form note.

name: residence_history_row_1_lived_with_me

description: Section 4b — Row 1: relationship to child for "Other" caregiver when that box is checked.
